page.title: Investments
page.subtitle: Track your investment portfolio
page.autoGeneratedSymbolNote: * Auto-generated symbol name. Could not find in Yahoo dataset.

summary.holdingsValueTooltip: The current market value of all securities you hold, based on the latest available prices.
summary.cashBalanceTooltip: Uninvested cash sitting in your investment accounts, available for purchasing securities.
summary.totalGainTooltip: The total profit or loss across all your investments: Portfolio Value minus Net Invested. Includes realized gains, unrealized gains, dividends, and interest.
summary.netInvestedTooltip: The net amount of your own money deposited into your investment accounts. This is total contributions minus withdrawals, excluding any investment gains, dividends, or interest earned.
summary.costBasisTooltip: The total amount you originally paid to acquire your investments, including purchase prices and transaction fees. Used to calculate your gains and losses.
summary.gainLossTooltip: Unrealized gain or loss on your current holdings: Market Value minus Cost Basis. Does not include realized gains from past sales or income received.
summary.simpleReturnTooltip: Total percentage gain or loss on your holdings, calculated as (Market Value − Cost Basis) ÷ Cost Basis. Does not account for the timing of contributions or withdrawals.
summary.twrTooltip: Measures how well your investments performed regardless of when you added or removed money. Eliminates the impact of cash flow timing to show pure investment performance.
summary.cagrTooltip: Compound Annual Growth Rate. Your annualized return based on Net Invested vs. current portfolio value, as if growth had been perfectly steady each year.

grouped.viewCashTransactions: Click to view cash account transactions
grouped.filterBySymbol: Click to filter transactions by this symbol

transactionList.deleteConfirmGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactionList.deleteConfirmTyped: Are you sure you want to delete this {action} transaction?
transactionList.deleteConfirmTypedForSymbol: Are you sure you want to delete this {action} transaction for {symbol}?

chart.title: Portfolio Value Over Time
chart.intradayFallbackTitleWithSymbols: Detailed intraday pricing isn't available because {symbols} use MSN Money, which doesn't expose intraday quotes. Showing daily snapshots instead.
chart.intradayViewUnavailable: Intraday view unavailable for this account mix
chart.intradayUnavailableDetailWithSymbols: One or more holdings use a quote provider (MSN Money) that does not expose intraday data: {symbols}. Switch to a longer range to see daily snapshots.
chart.intradayUnavailableDetailGeneric: One or more holdings use a quote provider (MSN Money) that does not expose intraday data. Switch to a longer range to see daily snapshots.
chart.noDataForPeriod: No investment data for this period.

form.noSecuritiesHeld: No securities held in this account
form.noSplitRatioWarning: No split ratio is set on this transaction. Enter the ratio as it was announced before saving — Monize won't assume one for you.
form.splitRatioHelp: Enter the ratio as it was announced. For a 2-for-1 split use 2 new and 1 old; for a 1-for-2 reverse split use 1 new and 2 old. Effective ratio:
form.newPricePerShareAfterSplit: New price per share, after split ({currency}, optional)
form.totalCostBasisPreserved: Total cost basis is preserved across the split.
form.noSharesHeldOnDate: No shares of this security were held in this account on {date}; the split will be recorded but won't change holdings until shares are added on or before that date.
form.transferCostBasisNote: The cost per share (prefilled from the source account) is carried to the destination so your gain and profit reports stay correct. This moves shares only -- no cash changes hands.
form.conversionHelp: Adjust the rate or the converted total to match the amount actually posted to your cash account.

toast.sourceDestinationDifferent: Source and destination accounts must be different
toast.quantityGreaterThanZero: Quantity must be greater than zero
toast.couldNotLoadPairedLeg: Could not load the paired transfer leg; reopen and try again
toast.splitRatioGreaterThanZero: Split ratio must be greater than zero
